title: archangelica sativa
intro: Archangelica sativa, also known as angelica or wild celery, is a biennial plant belonging to the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Archangelica sativa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and supporting digestion. The herbal preparations of Archangelica sativa can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to soothe colds, flu, and other infections.
